title: fix: forward requestContext to tools in createToolCallStep

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix: forward requestContext to tools in createToolCallStep
similarOrDuplicatePRs.author: intojhanurag

relatedIssues.title: requestContext not forwarded to tools in createToolCallStep

summary: Adds requestContext forwarding to tool executions in createToolCallStep, fixing issue #13088 where tools received an empty RequestContext instead of the one set by the workflow step. Changes span 3 files: adds requestContext to MastraToolInvocationOptions type, passes it through in tool-call-step.ts, and updates CoreToolBuilder to prefer execution-time context. However, PR #13094 by intojhanurag made the exact same fix (with the same title), included tests and a changeset, and was already merged on 2026-02-17 — the day after this PR was opened.
maintainerNotes: This PR is a direct duplicate of #13094 which was already merged. Both fix issue #13088 with nearly identical code changes. This PR lacks tests and a changeset that #13094 included. It also has merge conflicts (likely caused by #13094 being merged first). Safe to close with a thank-you note to the contributor.
